## What does this change?

<!-- One or two sentences. Link the issue if there is one. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Dataset changes include a log sample or documentation link and bump the `updated` date
- [ ] Engine changes have a test with the motivating robots.txt snippet
- [ ] CSP, accessibility, CLI exit codes, and privacy effects were considered
- [ ] Protected visual files and the split-theme preview were left unchanged unless the change was requested
